Title: KENNEDY SPACE CENTER, FLA.  -   Japanese girls from Urawa Daiichi Girls High School, Urawa, Japan, place a floral tribute to the crew of Columbia at the STS-107 memorial stone at the Spacehab facility, Cape Canaveral, Fla.   The group was  awarded the trip to Florida when their experiments were chosen to fly on mission STS-107.  The group was also meeting with American students from Melbourne and Jacksonville, Fla.   The National Space Development  Agency of Japan (NASDA) and the KSC International Space Station and Payloads Processing Directorate worked with the NASA KSC Education Programs and University Research Division to coordinate the students’ visit.
CreditLine: NASA Image and Video Library (public domain)
